summary: Completed initial MVP testing of Cactus multiplayer card game. Backend APIs mostly functional (11/12 tests passed). Frontend UI loads correctly with desert theme. Authentication works but has session management issues. Core game flows partially tested.

ui_bugs.issue: User authentication session not persisting consistently across navigation
User gets redirected to login page unexpectedly during navigation

passed_tests: Frontend: Initial page load with desert theme ✅
Frontend: Successful registration and redirect to lobby ✅
Frontend: Join room dialog with error handling ✅
Frontend: Desert theme elements (cactus, clouds, animations) ✅

critical_issues: Fix session management - users are getting unexpectedly logged out during navigation
Ensure authentication tokens persist properly in localStorage/sessionStorage
recommendations: Implement proper error handling for authentication failures
Consider adding loading states during authentication checks
